recommendations.title: Innocence
recommendations.overview: Yusuf is released from prison after serving a ten year sentence. Because of unexpected problems at his sister’s house, he finds himself in a cheap hotel where he meets a man, a woman, and a child who will change his life in unexpected ways…

recommendations.title: All Day and a Night
recommendations.overview: While serving life in prison, a young man looks back at the people, the circumstances and the system that set him on the path toward his crime.

recommendations.title: Air Bud: Spikes Back
recommendations.overview: Air Bud finds that he has the uncanny ability to play volleyball.

recommendations.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
recommendations.overview: When illegal card dealer and recovering heroin addict Frankie Machine gets out of prison, he decides to straighten up. Armed with nothing but an old drum set, Frankie tries to get honest work as a drummer. But when his former employer and his old dru

recommendations.title: Violation
recommendations.overview: A troubled woman on the edge of divorce returns home to her younger sister after years apart. But when her sister and brother-in-law betray her trust, she embarks on a vicious crusade of revenge.

recommendations.title: Song of the Sea
recommendations.overview: The story of the last Seal Child’s journey home. After their mother’s disappearance, Ben and Saoirse are sent to live with Granny in the city. When they resolve to return to their home by the sea, their journey becomes a race against time as they are

recommendations.title: 18 Presents
recommendations.overview: Elisa is only forty when an incurable disease takes her from her husband and their daughter. Before her heart stops, Elisa finds a way to stay close to her: a gift for every birthday up to her adult age, 18 gifts to try to accompany her child's growt

recommendations.title: Easy Money
recommendations.overview: To inherit his mother-in-law's colossal fortune, a hard living gambling addict must change his unhealthy ways before it gets the best of him.

recommendations.title: Hush

recommendations.title: The Woodsman
